Welcome to Module 2. In this module, we're going to start by talking about the keys to the perfect six-figure funnel formula product. Most marketers don't understand the role that their front-end product, their first product sold to a prospect, plays. So we're going to start by talking about the purpose of the front-end product. Then we're going to go on to talk about what's called strategic front-end product development, how to actually develop the perfect first product that you sell to a prospect so that it fulfills its role and purpose. And then we're going to talk about how to incorporate your hook and promise into the development of this first or front-end product.
